commands.review_summary:
The branch adds IDENTITY.md-specific guidance to the agent project-context prompt, covers it with a system-prompt regression test, and tweaks a memory-core plugin dreaming mock for the current test shape.

PR surface: Source +8, Tests +15. Total +23 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction is available. Source inspection shows current main lacks the proposed IDENTITY.md-specific guidance, but the only demonstrated check is the proposed system-prompt regression test.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blockers are contributor proof, dirty-branch handling, and maintainer prompt-policy/compatibility acceptance rather than an automation-ready code repair.

target.title: fix(prompt): preserve IDENTITY defaults in system prompt
target.body:
## Summary
- preserve explicit IDENTITY.md expression defaults in normal chat replies
- keep naming, vibe, and preferred emoji guidance visible in the system prompt when IDENTITY.md is present
- add a focused regression test for that prompt text

## Verification
- reviewed and kept the rebuild scoped to the real feature files only
- passed targeted test:
  - `src/agents/system-prompt.test.ts` (53/53)
- changed-files lint passed

## Notes
- rebuilt cleanly from the closed #62953 on top of current upstream main
- full commit hook hit a `tsgo` resource failure in this environment, so commit used scoped verification plus targeted tests instead of the full suite

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior or issue addressed: IDENTITY.md expression defaults remain visible in normal chat system prompt construction after confirming the branch is current with main.
- Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw dev workspace on Linux/WSL2 after merging current origin/main into this PR branch.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/agents/system-prompt.test.ts
- Evidence after fix: Terminal output from the local OpenClaw workspace:
  [test] starting test/vitest/vitest.unit-fast.config.ts
  Test Files  1 passed (1)
  Tests  63 passed (63)
  [test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 33.93s
- Observed result after fix: The system prompt regression coverage passed on the current branch head.
- What was not tested: A live model conversation against a deployed gateway was not replayed in this pass.
